hero.title: The Astronaut Farmer
hero.reason: In honor of National Escargot Day, we're launching into a film about a man who dreams big, just like the escargot that dreams of being more than just a snack.
hero.blurb: This heartwarming film is out of this world, with a stellar cast and a story that will leave you feeling starstruck. It's a beautifully crafted tale of following your dreams, no matter how impossible they may seem.

released.title: Pirates of the Caribbean: At World's End
released.reason: Released today in 2007, this swashbuckling adventure still rules the high seas with its unforgettable characters and epic battles.
released.blurb: The third installment in the Pirates franchise is a thrilling ride, with stunning action sequences and a talented cast. It's a must-see for fans of the series and adventure lovers alike.

birthday.title: The Grand Budapest Hotel
birthday.reason: Happy birthday to John C. Reilly, born May 24, 1965, starring in this quirky and charming film that showcases his unique talent.
birthday.blurb: This visually stunning film is a delight to watch, with a talented cast and a story that is both humorous and heartfelt. John C. Reilly shines in his role, bringing depth and complexity to the character.

awful.title: I Know Who Killed Me
awful.reason: This infamous film is a masterclass in bad acting, poor writing, and cringe-worthy plot twists, making it a must-see for those who enjoy so-bad-it's-good cinema.
awful.blurb: With a convoluted plot and terrible acting, this film is a trainwreck that you can't look away from. It's a fascinating example of how a movie can go so wrong, making it a guilty pleasure for some.
